segments.text: Yeah, this shot is looking really really good. I am not a huge fan of that flare on the right that is intersecting the balloon. Lets see if we can get rid of it.
segments.speaker: James Spadafora

segments.text: The background on this shot is definitely way too dark. Let's see if we can add a little bit more lighting to the background while still keeping the moody feel. Also, let's let's go back to modeling and bump up that table a little bit, make it a bit bigger. Make sure you check in with Olga on the texturing. great next version.
segments.speaker: James Spadafora
